title: I’d switch to a Pixel in a heartbeat if it weren’t for this Samsung app
summary: Pixel is tempting, but I'm spoiled and I know it.
body: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority Between my old Galaxy S22 and the current S26, I’ve been a loyal Samsung user for over four years now. But I’ve always been tempted by Pixel phones. Not just as a secondary device, but to actually use it as a daily driver. And honestly, devices like the Pixel 10 and Pixel 10a make a very compelling case for themselves. You get a clean Android experience, useful Pixel-only features , and above all, faster software updates. But if there’s one Samsung app that stops me from making the switch, it’s Good Lock . It’s not just any OEM app — it’s more like a toolkit for power users. And the more I’ve used it over the years, the more it’s changed what I expect from a smartphone.
